archimate:Grouping.name: Translation Enablers
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Machine Translation Enablers ABB is a Groping that refers to tools or components that facilitate the translation of text from one language to another using machine learning techniques
Source: Inspired in eTranslation
Source reference: https://commission.europa.eu/resources-partners/etranslation_en
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Technical view - application
Interoperability Saliency: The Translation Enablers Grouping ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it comprises a set of tools and components that ensure the translation of digital public services to different languages in the European Union by using machine learning techniques.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TranslationEnablersGrouping
ABB name: eira:TranslationEnablersGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/TranslationEnablersGrouping
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication

properties.value: Machine Translation Enablers ABB is a Groping that refers to tools or components that facilitate the translation of text from one language to another using machine learning techniques

The Translation Enablers Grouping ABB is salient for technical interoperability because it comprises a set of tools and components that ensure the translation of digital public services to different languages in the European Union by using machine learning techniques.
